MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON OCT-31-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER JAMES PARTRICK CASETILLO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner James Patrick Castillo present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and suffcient, and the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name to James Patrick Maginniss.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Text Ruling
